title: centaurea ispahanica
intro: Centaurea ispahanica, also known as Spotted knapweed or Ispahan cornflower, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Iran. It is a member of the asteraceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea ispahanica include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues.
